Mauchly, its co-inventor, and Kathleen “Kay” McNulty, one of the six original programmers—married a few years after its completion and raised seven children together. title: US Democratic lawmakers visit Cuba, call on Trump to "bring the rhetoric down" - Reuters
summary: US Democratic lawmakers visit Cuba, call on Trump to "bring the rhetoric down"  Reuters
